Petition For A Determination Of Rights In Real Property
Off Calendar Dec-01-2022 Continued To Dec-29-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 305

Petition For A Determination Of Rights In Real Property
Off Calendar Jun-06-2019 Continued To Jul-11-19 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
This matter was called with case no. PTR-19-302661; In the matter of the Raymond L. Mar Revocable Trust.

Appearances:
Ujrala Singh, Esq. for Gregory Mar, Petitioner.
Ciaran O'Sullivan, Esq. for Gregory Mar, Petitioner.
Michael Spalding, Esq. for Antoinette Mallette and Veronica Morligne.

Matter called. Argument on the sole issue of disqualification is held.

At the conclusion of argument, the Court ordered additional briefing and continued both matters to July 11, 2019 at 2:30 p.m. in Dept. 204. Mr. O'Sullivan's reply is to be filed by June 21, 2019. Ms. Singh's sur-reply is to be filed by June 28, 2019.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Court Reporter: Elizabeth Lee, #5828, Tel. 415.753.3474, Email: Lizleecsr@att.net. Deputy: K. Chan.

Petition For A Determination Of Rights In Real Property
Off Calendar Apr-29-2019 Continued To Jun-06-19 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204
